data.title: Esquire Financial Holdings, Inc. Named to KBW's Bank Honor Roll for Third Consecutive Year
data.description: On April 29, 2026, in Jericho, New York, Esquire Financial Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ESQ), the financial holding firm for Esquire Bank, National Association, disclosed its participation in the Keefe, Bruyette index. The Company, responsible for Esquire Bank, shared this update.

data.title: XELA Robotics Deepens U.S. Market Commitment with Plug and Play Investment and New Sensor Capabilities to be Introduced at the Robotics Summit and Expo in Boston
data.description: XELA Robotics, a leading provider of advanced 3D tactile sensors for robots to mimic human touch, is ramping up its growth in the US. The company unveiled significant upgrades to its operations in New York and Tokyo on April 29, 2026. This move represents a strategic push to consolidate its presence in key markets, focusing on cutting-edge technology to enhance robots' sensory capabilities. For more details, please visit xelarobotics.com.

data.title: Nomadar Advances Scalable Live-Events Platform Strategy Following National Recognition of Cádiz Music Stadium and Rapid 2026 Expansion
data.description: Nomadar's venue monetization model received validation as it progresses with its European live-events infrastructure strategy and flagship JP Financial Arena development. This recognition highlights the company's efforts as it accelerates execution in the industry. The news was reported from Marshall, Texas, on April 29, 2026.

data.title: Webull to Release First Quarter 2026 Results on May 21, 2026
data.description: St. Petersburg, Florida, April 29, 2026 - Today, Webull Corporation (NASDAQ: BULL) revealed its plan to unveil the financial outcomes for the first quarter of 2026 post-market close on May 21, 2026. This announcement will be followed by a conference call led by the management team to delve into the details of the performance.

data.title: TRACE-Funded Corruption Documentary Nominated for Emmy
data.description: An investigative documentary called Bribe, Inc. has been nominated for the Best Business and Economic Documentary Emmy. The film delves into the discovery of a massive corporate bribery scandal known as the Unaoil affair, considered one of the largest in modern history. The documentary sheds light on the scandal and its implications through firsthand accounts and evidence. The nomination is a recognition of the documentary's impactful exploration of this high-profile case.

data.title: PLANET FITNESS NAMED TO AMERICA'S MOST CHARITABLE COMPANIES 2026 LIST BY NEWSWEEK
data.description: Planet Fitness, a prominent fitness franchise, stood out as the sole gym mentioned in the latest rankings. The company, headquartered in Hampton, N.H., received this acknowledgment in Newsweek's 2026 America's Most Prominent Fitness Centers list. With a vast membership base, Planet Fitness is among the leading fitness center operators in the industry, surpassing other brands in terms of member count. This recognition speaks to the company's significant presence and popularity within the fitness sector, consolidating its position as a national fitness leader.

data.title: Strengthen Readiness for a Potential SAS-to-R Shift in Data Analytics, Upcoming Webinar Hosted by Xtalks
data.description: Join our upcoming webinar to discover how utilizing R can enhance compliant and future-proof clinical data analytics. Participants will gain insights into effective governance and validation methods for using R in GxP settings. Expert speakers will discuss key organizational factors to consider when adopting analytics...

data.title: Caris Life Sciences Publishes Study Validating Caris AI Insights for Temozolomide Benefit in Glioblastoma Patients
data.description: Caris Life Sciences®, a prominent AI TechBio company specializing in precision medicine, released proprietary Caris AI Insights exclusively for its customers. Based in Irving, Texas, the announcement was made on April 29, 2026. Caris AI Insights are advanced tools designed to enhance patient care and treatment outcomes. Note that Caris Life Sciences® is listed on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol CAI.

data.title: Greenland Energy Company (NASDAQ: GLND) Advancing Arctic Exploration Strategy in Promising Land Basin Area
data.description: On April 29, 2026, Greenland Energy Company (NASDAQ: GLND) was featured in an editorial by EnergyWireNews, a brand under the Dynamic Brand Portfolio@IBN, a communication platform with over 75 brands. The platform specializes in distributing financial news and content for private and public companies, catering to the investment community.

data.title: ALPHAMIN ANNOUNCES CAD$0.13 PER SHARE FINAL FY2025 DIVIDEND/ FILES Q1 2026 FINANCIAL STATEMENTS AND MD&A
data.description: Today, Alphamin Resources Corp. disclosed its final dividend for FY2025 and submitted its unaudited consolidated financial statements and Management’s Discussion and Analysis for the three months ending March 31, 2026. The dividend announcement comes in the wake of the company's presence on the TSXV under the ticker symbol AFM and the JSE AltX under APH. These documents can be accessed on SEDAR at www.sedarplus.ca.

data.title: Alliance Entertainment Relaunches Movies Unlimited as a Curated Platform for Movie Collectors, Driving Revenue Growth
data.description: Movies Unlimited is undergoing a repositioning strategy to shift from a transactional retailer to an extendable UNLIMITED platform. This transformation aims to enhance lifetime value, boost profitability, and facilitate category expansion. The company is making changes to its business model to focus on providing a wider range of services and products. This shift is expected to bring in more revenue and create new opportunities for growth. The goal is to increase customer engagement and loyalty while also driving financial success.

data.title: Methode Electronics Appoints Industry Veteran Arnie Jensen to the Executive Leadership Team Overseeing Global Operations
data.description: Today, Methode Electronics, Inc. disclosed that Arnie Jensen, a seasoned professional in the manufacturing sector, has been appointed as the Vice President of Global Operations. This addition to the executive team aims to improve Methode's worldwide operations performance. Leveraging his broad expertise in manufacturing, operations, and business management, Jensen will play a key role in advancing the company's operational efficiency. Methode is striving to solidify its position as a top electronic solutions provider globally. This move is significant for the company, listed on the NYSE as MEI, signaling its commitment to enhancing operations.

data.title: Key decisions made at Rapala VMC Corp's AGM and Organising Meeting of BoD. No. XYZ resolutions passed.
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous month's rate of 4.8%. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 new jobs, exceeding expectations and indicating a positive trend in job growth. The report also highlighted a slight increase in average hourly wages, which rose by 2.5% compared to the same period last year. Overall, these numbers suggest a strengthening labor market and a positive outlook for the country's economy.

data.title: RoboForex Expands CFD Offering with Cryptocurrency Instruments
data.description: In Belize City on April 29, 2026, the financial broker RoboForex announced the expansion of its CFD offerings by introducing cryptocurrency instruments. This new offering allows clients to trade top digital assets in addition to Forex, metals, indices, and other asset classes within the company's platform. This move provides clients with more diversified investment options and access to the growing cryptocurrency market.

data.title: REHLKO SECURES ANOTHER 1.7 GIGAWATTS OF BACKUP POWER ORDERS SUPPORTING HYPERSCALE DATA CENTER GROWTH
data.description: Rehlko announced today the acquisition of around 1.7 gigawatts (GW) in backup power contracts for hyperscale data center developments in North America. This surge in momentum demonstrates the increasing demand from major platforms as they expand their artificial intelligence and cloud operations.

data.title: Qubs announces the availability of new Qubitunes games including Soundscapes, Jurassic Sounds and Qubi Quiz, previewed at international Toy Fairs
data.description: In Oslo, Norway, on April 29, 2026, Qubs unveiled new expansions for its acclaimed Qubitunes screen-free audio gaming platform. The expansions include Soundscapes, Jurassic Sounds, Qubi Quiz, MC Mutts, and Bernard's Kitchen Cook-off. These additions come following the success of the platform, which has garnered awards for its innovation.

data.title: Martus Brings Conversational AI to Budgeting, Turning Financial Data into Real-Time Answers
data.description: Martus Intelligence has introduced new AI capabilities to enhance accessibility to financial data without the need for custom reports. The expansion allows customers to ask questions and access secure insights quickly. This development was announced by Martus Solutions in San Francisco on April 29, 2026. This initiative aims to provide fast and secure insights to customers without the necessity of bespoke reports.

data.title: Cloyes CEO John Hanighen Appointed Chairman of the Board for Cloyes by MidOcean Partners
data.description: Cloyes Gear & Products, Inc. ("Cloyes"), a major player in North America and a global provider of timing drive systems for the automotive aftermarket, revealed that CEO John Hanighen has been named Chairman of the Board by MidOcean Partners. This move demonstrates trust in Hanighen's guidance and Cloyes' strategic vision. As a leader in this industry, Cloyes remains dedicated to delivering top-notch products and services under Hanighen's leadership.
